name: security
description: Security plus: threat modeling, role/permission matrices, static Supabase RLS review, manual-only test planning, redacted secret detection & rotation guidance, and abuse-case analysis. Live RLS validation never runs automatically and production writes are refused. Skill: authz-security-reviewer (pairs with site-doctor's security-review). Commands: /security:threat-model, /security:authz-matrix, /security:secrets-fix, /security:rls-test, /security:abuse-cases.
